name: clearvo
description: Submit e-invoices, calculate global tax (VAT/GST/sales tax), and validate tax numbers via the Clearvo API
long_description: Connects Claude to the Clearvo tax compliance API. Submit B2B e-invoices to national tax authorities (SDI, KSeF, ANAF, SII, NAV, myDATA, Peppol, and more), calculate VAT/GST/sales tax across 100+ countries, and validate business tax numbers against official registries (VIES, HMRC, ABN Lookup, and others). Requires a free Clearvo account — create one at https://app.clearvo.io/register.

api_key.title: Clearvo API Key
api_key.description: From app.clearvo.io/settings — starts with csk_live_ or csk_test_

entity_id.title: Entity ID (optional)
entity_id.description: Only needed with an account-scoped API key operating across multiple entities. Leave blank for entity-scoped keys, or run list_entities to find it.

base_url.title: API Base URL (optional)
base_url.description: Only change this if your account is on a white-label tenant — e.g. https://api.taxually.com/v1 for a Taxually-branded account. Leave as the default for app.clearvo.io accounts.
